messages.content:
Choose the version below that uses parallel structure correctly.
When Luisa Rivera was younger, she would visit my farm and count the chickens in the coop, counting the pigs in the pen
counting the pigs in the pen
the pigs in the pen
do a counting of the pigs in the pen
, and count the sheep
count the sheep
the sheep
also the sheep
 in the field.
When Luisa Rivera was younger, she would visit my farm and count the chickens in the coop, count the pigs in the pen, and count the sheep in the field.

Which payment option is not accepted online?
Debit Card
Credit Card
Check
Cash
Cash is not accepted as a payment option online.

What can help you meet your budget while shopping for important items?
Following recommendations for important features from social media influencers.
Buying the item with the best features.
Prioritizing features to meet your needs.
Making a list of your wants to meet your needs.

Prioritizing features to meet your needs can help you meet your budget while shopping for important items. By identifying and prioritizing the features most important to you, you can make informed decisions about what you truly need and what you can live without, potentially saving you money in the long run.

When making a large purchase, you should avoid everything EXCEPT _______________________
excessive fees.
add-ons that seem too good to be true.
being forced to buy additional warranties.
a price that fits comfortably in your budget.

When making a large purchase, you should avoid everything EXCEPT a price that fits comfortably in your budget. This means you should avoid excessive fees, add-ons that seem too good to be true, and being forced to buy additional warranties. These items can drive up the cost of your purchase and potentially put you in a financially risky situation.

What is one of the best ways to get reliable information about a product?
Look for the advertisements
Search online reviews
Ask someone who has never used it
Follow a social media influencer

One of the best ways to get reliable information about a product is to search online reviews. Reading reviews from other people who have already used the product can give you a better idea of how well it works, what its pros and cons are, and whether it’s worth the investment. Reviews can be found on various websites such as Amazon, BestBuy, and Walmart among others.

How does a consumer know whether a purchase may be a good deal?
A large percentage of positive customer ratings offer detailed explanations.
The item has the most features compared to other similar items.
The price is the most expensive for that type of item.
Both A and B

A consumer can know whether a purchase may be a good deal when a large percentage of positive customer ratings offer detailed explanations, and the item has the most features compared to other similar items. Option A will indicate that most customers are happy with the product and are describing their satisfaction in detail. Option B will indicate that the item has more to offer and may have more of the features you are looking for.

Why is figuring out the unit price of something useful when shopping?
It determines if a coupon is still usable.
It helps you locate items in the store.
It helps you check to see if the price is correct.
It helps you determine the best deal.

Figuring out the unit price of something is useful when shopping because it helps you determine the best deal. The unit price tells you the cost per unit of a product, such as per ounce or per pound, which allows you to compare prices between different sizes or brands of the same product. By comparing the unit prices, you can determine which option gives you the most product for your money and ultimately helps you save money while shopping.

Making a good purchasing decision requires __________.
comparing the prices of similar items
reading reviews of the product
waiting until the product is on sale, if possible
All of the above

Making a good purchasing decision requires all of the above: comparing the prices of similar items, reading reviews of the product, and waiting until the product is on sale, if possible. By comparing the prices of similar items and reading reviews of the product, you can ensure that you are getting the best value for your money and that the product meets your needs. Additionally, waiting for a sale or promotion can help you get the product at a lower price and potentially save you money in the long run.

Which method of payment actually is a form of borrowing money that needs to be paid back later?
Credit Card
Check
Cash
Debit Card

Credit Card is a form of borrowing money that needs to be paid back later. When an individual uses a credit card to make a purchase, they are essentially borrowing money from the credit card issuer, which must be paid back with interest. In contrast to a debit card, where the money is withdrawn from the individual's bank account, a credit card company extends a line of credit to the individual, allowing them to spend up to a certain limit which must be paid back later.

Which example shows an advantage of owning a car over leasing one?
Smaller monthly payments and good warranty to cover repairs.
Expiring warranty means that you will get to handle repair payments.
You will drive a fairly new car for a limited period of time.
No restrictions on the number of miles to drive and the ability to customize, or make changes to the car.

No restrictions on the number of miles to drive and the ability to customize, or make changes to the car is an advantage of owning a car over leasing one. When you purchase a car, you own it and have the freedom to make any customizations or modifications that you desire and can drive as many miles as you desire without any additional fees or penalties. In contrast, when you lease a car, you are limited in the number of miles you can drive and cannot make any modifications without the permission of the lessor.

Leasing a car may be a better option than buying a car if...
you have enough money for a large down payment.
you want the extended warranty and maintenance because you plan on having the car for a while.
you don't plan on having it for long and don't want to worry about regular maintenance.
you travel great distances regularly.

Leasing a car may be a better option than buying a car if you don't plan on having it for long and don't want to worry about regular maintenance. When you lease a car, you typically only have it for a few years, which can be a good option if you want to avoid the maintenance and repair costs that come with owning a car in the long term. Additionally, since you don't own the car, you do not have to worry about selling it once you're finished with it. However, if you travel great distances regularly, leasing a car may not be the best option, as most lease agreements limit the number of miles you can drive each year.

Which is a positive reason for using a credit card to finance purchases?
You'll be able to spend a lot of money without paying it back
You won't have to budget for your credit card expenses.
You will get charged high interest.
Paying it off on time can help build your credit history

Paying off a credit card on time can help build your credit history, which is a positive reason for using a credit card to finance purchases. By making timely payments on a credit card, you can show lenders that you are responsible with credit, which can help improve your credit score over time. A good credit score is an important factor in obtaining loans, such as for a car or a home purchase. It is important to remember that using a credit card to finance purchases should be done responsibly and within one's budget to avoid high interest charges and accumulating debt.

The cost of a secured loan is typically lower than the cost of an unsecured loan because _______.
it requires collateral.
your parents will make sure you pay it back.
it has high interest rates.
the loan takes longer to get.

The cost of a secured loan is typically lower than the cost of an unsecured loan because it requires collateral. Collateral is an asset that is held as security for the repayment of the loan. This reduces the lender's risk because if the borrower fails to repay the loan, the lender may seize the collateral to recover the loan amount. Since the lender's risk is lower, the borrower can typically obtain the loan at a lower interest rate than they would with an unsecured loan, which does not require collateral.

Which of the following is NOT a recommended method to protect you from identity theft?
Regularly monitoring your credit report.
Place a credit freeze with the credit bureaus.
Contacting lenders and credit bureaus to report inaccurate information.
Expensive specialty locking or monitoring service.

Expensive specialty locking or monitoring service is NOT a recommended method to protect you from identity theft. There are many affordable and effective ways to protect yourself from identity theft, such as regularly monitoring your credit report, placing a credit freeze with the credit bureaus, and contacting lenders and credit bureaus to report inaccurate information. While specialty locking or monitoring services may be helpful for some individuals, they are often expensive and may not be necessary for most people to protect themselves from identity theft.

Using a loan could help with the purchase of which of the following?
Airline tickets to your dream vacation
A dream wedding
A house
A new television

Using a loan could help with the purchase of a house, as mortgages can be used to finance the purchase of real estate. Mortgages are long term loans with a generally lower interest rate than credit cards, which makes them an affordable option to finance the purchase of a house. Options such as personal loans or credit cards may be considered for smaller purchases such as airline tickets or household appliances. It is important to research different options, and read the loan agreement carefully to ensure that you can afford the payments and are aware of the terms and conditions of the loan.

What will happen to your credit score if you do not manage your debt wisely?
It will not affect your credit score
Your credit score will go down
Your credit score will go up
You won't be able to track your credit score

If you do not manage your debt wisely, your credit score will go down. One of the biggest factors that affect your credit score is your payment history, which makes up 35% of your score. Late payments, defaults, or high amounts of debt can negatively impact your payment history, causing your credit score to decrease. In addition to payment history, other factors, such as credit utilization rate, credit mix, and length of credit history, also play a role in determining your credit score. It is important to manage your debt wisely by making timely payments and maintaining a good credit utilization rate to avoid negatively impacting your credit score.

Paying only the minimum balance on your credit card can lead to...
an increase in your credit score
paying more interest.
late fees
All of the above

Paying only the minimum balance on your credit card can lead to paying more interest and late fees, sometimes leading to debt spirals. When you only make the minimum payment on your credit card, it can take a long time to pay off your balance, and you will end up paying more in interest over time. Additionally, missing payments or making late payments can result in late fees and even further increases in interest rates. This can lead to quickly accumulating debt, making it harder to pay off the balance over time and causing additional financial stress. It is important to pay more than the minimum payment each month to avoid these negative consequences and pay down your debt more quickly.

Going directly to a car dealer for a loan to keep things simple is a...
not great because they typically offer higher interest rates.
not great because car dealers don't offer loans.
great idea because they want you to get the car so it'll be the best offer.
great idea because you don't have to deal with another lender.

Going directly to a car dealer for a loan to keep things simple is NOT a great idea because they typically offer higher interest rates. While the convenience of obtaining a loan directly from a car dealer may be attractive, it is important for consumers to shop around and compare rates from various lenders, including banks, credit unions, and other financial institutions, to ensure they receive the best possible rate. Car dealers may offer loans with higher interest rates, which can result in paying more over the course of the loan, so it's important to compare the offer with other lending institutions before settling with one.

What is NOT a benefit of having a good credit score?
You'll get better interest rates on your loans.
When you need a loan, you'll have more loan offers to pick from.
You'll get accepted to better education institutions.
It will be easier to get an apartment.

Getting accepted to better education institutions is NOT a benefit of having a good credit score. While a good credit score can offer many benefits, such as better interest rates on loans and more loan offers to pick from, it does not affect admissions decisions for education institutions. Admissions decisions for education institutions are based on academic performance, extracurricular activities, and other factors, not on credit scores. However, having a good credit score may make it easier to qualify for student loans and may help you obtain better interest rates if you need to borrow money to pay for education expenses.

Which is NOT considered an additional cost beyond tuition for higher education?
Transportation
Textbooks and supplies
Room and board
Academic counseling

Academic counseling is NOT considered an additional cost beyond tuition for higher education. While academic counseling is often available to students free of charge, other expenses beyond tuition may be incurred, such as transportation, textbooks and supplies, and room and board. These additional costs can vary depending on the school and location, but they can significantly increase the overall cost of attendance for students and their families. It is important to consider all of these expenses when planning for higher education costs and to research and budget accordingly.

All of the following are true about why it is important to complete the Free Application for Federal Student Aid (FAFSA) process EXCEPT:
It allows you to be eligible for early admission.
It allows you to be eligible for some grants.
It allows you to be eligible for federal student aid.
It allows you to be eligible for many scholarships.

It allows you to be eligible for early admission is NOT true about why it is important to complete the Free Application for Federal Student Aid (FAFSA) process. The FAFSA is a required form for students who want to be considered for federal student aid, such as grants, work-study, and loans. In addition, many state and institutional aid programs also use the FAFSA to determine eligibility for their programs. Completing the FAFSA can help students access financial resources that can make higher education more affordable and increase their chances of completing their degree.

What are the benefits of attending a local community college?
It is cheaper to earn an Associate’s degree at a community college and then transfer to a four-year college to finish.
You can live at home and save dorm fees while earning an Associate’s degree.
Choosing a local community college within closer driving range saves on transportation costs.
All of the above.

All of the above are benefits of attending a local community college. By attending a community college, students can save money on tuition, as it is generally less expensive to earn an Associate’s degree at a community college compared to a four-year college. Additionally, students can save money by living at home and avoiding expensive dorm fees. Attending a local community college can also save on transportation costs, as they are usually located closer to home than four-year colleges. Finally, attending a community college can offer opportunities to transfer to a four-year college, allowing students to finish their degree while still saving money on tuition and other expenses.

Living at home could save you money while enrolled in post secondary school or training because...
it reduces costs of room and board.
it reduces costs of tuition.
it reduces costs of books and supplies.
it reduces costs of transportation.

Living at home could save you money while enrolled in post secondary school or training because it reduces costs of room and board. Room and board can be one of the most significant expenses for students enrolled in post-secondary education or training. By living at home, students can save a significant amount of money by avoiding the cost of room and board, which can free up funds for other expenses, such as tuition, books and supplies, and transportation. However, it is important to consider the potential impact on the student's academic and social experiences when making this decision.

All of the following are true about the Free Application for Federal Student Aid (FAFSA) EXCEPT:
The form is only available online.
States have different deadlines for applying for state aid
The earliest you can submit your FAFSA is October 1st of each year.
You can fill out the FAFSA if you are independent or dependent.

The Free Application for Federal Student Aid (FAFSA) form is NOT only available online. The FAFSA form is available both online and in paper form, which can be requested by calling the Federal Student Aid Information Center. Additionally, the form can be completed using a mobile application called myStudentAid, available for both iOS and Android devices. The other given statements are true: States have different deadlines for applying for state aid, the earliest you can submit your FAFSA is October 1st of each year, and you can fill out the FAFSA if you are independent or dependent.

Earning a degree can be expensive but which example shows why it might be worth it?
Individuals with a bachelor’s degree typically earn a higher annual salary than those without one.
Expensive degrees guarantee a low paying job afterwards.
A high school diploma allows you earn money instead of going into debt.
Federal student loans are offered at low interest rates which makes it more affordable.

Individuals with a bachelor’s degree typically earn a higher annual salary than those without one is an example of why earning a degree might be worth it. While obtaining a degree can be expensive and may require taking out student loans, many studies show that individuals with a bachelor's degree or higher have higher lifetime earnings compared to those without one. Graduates with higher education degrees may also have more opportunities for career advancement, increasing their earning potential over time. While there are expenses associated with obtaining a degree, the long-term payoff for higher lifetime earnings can make it worth the investment.

Dimitri’s counselor told him that post secondary education can be expensive but can pay off in the long run, what does that mean?
The salary you will earn with a degree will pay back the cost of college over your career.
You can get grants and scholarships to pay for post secondary education while you are there.
There are less expensive options for obtaining a post secondary education.
All of the above
Dimitri’s counselor told him that post secondary education can be expensive but can pay off
